centers.description: Outside the hull; not a tile, never walkable.
Stair/ladder; connects to the vertically-aligned tile on an adjacent deck.
Docking port / airlock (walkable floor); a mooring/boarding tile. Its outward normal is the edge whose door (=) faces void.
Spawn / arrival tile (walkable floor); where crew appear ashore.
Decorative rug (walkable floor); honours the NE-corner colour code.
Seat / chair (walkable floor); honours the NE-corner colour code.
Bed (walkable floor); honours the NE-corner colour code.
Cargo pallet (walkable floor): the unit of breakbulk hold capacity — a hull's breakbulk capacity is its number of pallet tiles. Door-size to load it is not enforced yet.
Fountain (walkable floor); adjacent fountains render as one larger pool. Honours the NE-corner colour.

edges.description: Wall-mounted screen (bridge viewscreen or a domestic TV) — a wall that carries art; blocks.
Wall-mounted window — a wall that carries a view; blocks.
